name: bio-forge
desc: A high-performance, pure Rust toolkit for standardizing and preparing biomolecular systems (proteins & nucleic acids). It heals missing atoms, resolves protona…
descFull: A high-performance, pure Rust toolkit for standardizing and preparing biomolecular systems (proteins & nucleic acids). It heals missing atoms, resolves protonation states, adds solvation, and unifies topologies to forge simulation-ready structures.
